creator: djhill@novagate.net
text:
gogo (ports/audio/gogo) does not compile on FreeBSD 5.0-CURRENT.

nasm -f elf -D__unix__  msubfpu.nas
nasm -f elf -D__unix__  msub3dn.nas
cc message.o bitstrem.o common.o encode.o huffman.o l3bs.o l3psy.o loop.o mdct.o subs.o tables.o vbrtag.o setup.o readsmpl.o musui.o musenc.o  clk.o haveunit.o huffmana.o quantize.o mdct3dn.o msubsse.o mdctfpu.o mdcttbl.o fft.o fftsse.o fft3dn.o ffttbl.o fftfpu.o l3psya.o  putbits.o align.o sbandtbl.o sbandsse.o sbandfpu.o sband3dn.o msubtbl.o msubfpu.o msub3dn.o  -o gogo -lm
cc: Internal compiler error: program ld got fatal signal 10
gmake: *** [gogo] Error 1
*** Error code 2

Stop in /usr/ports/audio/gogo.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/audio/gogo.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/audio/gogo.

$

How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/audio/gogo
make
